name: Jitterbit Integration Platform REST API
what_it_does: Jitterbit integration platform REST API for enterprises, SaaS vendors, and IT teams to build, deploy, and manage data integration workflows, API gateways, EDI transformations, and process automation — connecting ERP, CRM, e-commerce, and cloud applications through Jitterbit's Harmony iPaaS platform with low-code visual integration designer and pre-built connectors. Enables AI agents to manage integration project for workflow pipeline creation and deployment automation, handle connector for SaaS and on-premise application connection automation, access transformation for data mapping and conversion rule automation, retrieve API gateway for custom REST API creation and management automation, manage EDI for electronic data interchange translation automation, handle scheduling for integration trigger and timing automation, access monitoring for integration run status and error tracking automation, retrieve logging for integration execution audit and debugging automation, manage environment for development/staging/production deployment automation, and integrate Jitterbit with Salesforce, SAP, NetSuite, and 300+ pre-built connectors for enterprise application integration automation.
use_cases: Building ERP-to-CRM data synchronization workflows for enterprise integration automation agents
Creating API gateways and custom APIs from existing backend systems for API management automation agents
Automating EDI transaction processing for supply chain partner integration automation agents
Monitoring and managing integration workflow execution for IT operations automation agents
not_for: Real-time streaming data (Jitterbit is batch/near-real-time, not Kafka-level streaming)
Data warehouse ETL at petabyte scale (Jitterbit is application integration, not big data ETL like dbt/Fivetran)
Simple point-to-point API calls (Jitterbit is for complex multi-system orchestration, not simple webhooks)
best_when: An enterprise IT team, SaaS vendor, or systems integrator wanting AI agents to build and manage data integration workflows, API gateways, and EDI transformations across ERP, CRM, e-commerce, and cloud applications through Jitterbit's low-code Harmony platform.
avoid_when: HARMONY PLATFORM IS REQUIRED: Jitterbit API manages workflows deployed on Harmony iPaaS; automated generic REST assumption creates platform_required; automated must have Jitterbit Harmony subscription before API management. VISUAL DESIGNER IS PRIMARY UX: Jitterbit integration workflows are primarily built in visual Harmony Studio; automated code-only assumption creates complexity for non-visual integration design; automated must understand Harmony Studio workflow concepts. CONNECTORS REQUIRE SPECIFIC CONFIGURATION: Each Jitterbit connector (Salesforce, SAP, NetSuite) requires specific auth and configuration; automated universal connector assumption creates connector_config_required; automated must configure each connector with target system credentials. AGENT-BASED ON-PREMISE REQUIRES INSTALLATION: On-premise integrations require Jitterbit Private Agent installation; automated cloud-only assumption creates no_agent for on-premise systems; automated must deploy and manage Jitterbit Private Agent for on-premise connectivity.

auth.notes: Jitterbit uses Basic Auth + OAuth2 for Harmony REST API. REST API with JSON. Alameda, CA HQ. Founded 2003. Products: Jitterbit Harmony (iPaaS), API Manager, EDI, Vinyl (no-code), Data Loader (Salesforce). 300+ pre-built connectors. SDKs: JS/Groovy scripting. Cloud or Private Agent. Backed by Accel-KKR (PE). Competes with Boomi, SnapLogic, and Celigo for mid-market iPaaS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial available; production requires Harmony subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by connector count and transaction volume; Professional and Enterprise tiers; API Manager add-on
pricing.notes: Alameda CA. Accel-KKR PE. Annual subscription. 300+ connectors. Mid-market iPaaS leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; integration execution and management APIs throttled per plan tier

known_agent_gotchas: HARMONY ORGANIZATION CONTEXT REQUIRED: Jitterbit API requires organization/environment context in all calls; automated context-free API assumption creates missing_org_context error; automated must specify organization and environment for every Harmony API call

OPERATIONS VS WORKFLOWS ARE DISTINCT CONCEPTS: Jitterbit distinguishes operations (single execution unit) from workflows (orchestrated sequence); automated single-operation assumption misses workflow orchestration; automated must understand Jitterbit operation/workflow hierarchy

PRIVATE AGENT REQUIRES SEPARATE MANAGEMENT: On-premise Private Agents require separate lifecycle management; automated cloud-agent assumption creates no_connectivity for on-premise systems; automated must monitor and manage Private Agent health separately

EDI PARTNER PROFILES MUST BE PRE-CONFIGURED: EDI integrations require partner profiles (ISA, GS segments); automated generic EDI assumption creates partner_not_found without pre-configured trading partner; automated must set up EDI partner profiles before EDI transaction processing

CONNECTOR VERSIONS MAY DIFFER: Jitterbit connector versions must match target system API versions; automated latest-connector assumption creates version_mismatch for older ERP versions; automated must verify connector version compatibility with target system
agent_readiness.security_notes: iPaaS integration. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Integration data including financial and PII.

security_score_components.security_notes: iPaaS. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Multi-system integration data flows.
